final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single large knowledge card illustration for children about the story of 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon / illustrated storybook aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at top, key story bullet points listed with labels on the side, and a cartoon narrative scene as the main body
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story from 三国, depicted in cartoon form for children
Scene/backdrop: must include a river battle scene evoking 赤壁 — fire, warships, and dramatic action appropriate for young audiences
Lighting/mood: needs a vivid, energetic and engaging atmosphere suited for children — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, child-friendly direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the card title (large, prominent); must include key story bullet points as labeled annotations beside the illustration
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; title must be clearly legible; bullet-point annotations must be visually distinct and positioned alongside the scene
Avoid:
